title: Senior Teacher - American Institute Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - American Institute Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at American Institute Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About American Institute Global Group:
American Institute Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute Global Group!
